heading: Pyth-2 direct cattle-generation test fails on the validated C=5040 coprime subfamily
text:
type: observation
tags: [qa, pyth2, figure29, c5040, cattle-problem]
body: Tested the only presently defensible direct construction path from Figure 29 into the stabilized cattle data. `pyth2_c5040_cattle_test.py` now uses the validated coprime `C=5040` subfamily and the page-131/page-132 claim that the radial lines are `G` values. The eight validated coprime-family `G` values are `6350401`, `254041`, `129649`, `99289`, `78481`, `6409`, `5569`, and `5161`. Against the stabilized bulls packet `W1=2226`, `X1=1602`, `Y1=891`, `Z1=1580`, the direct route fails cleanly: none of the raw bulls values match a coprime-family `G`, none satisfy the square conditions `G-C` and `G+C` for `C=5040`, and none of the one-seventh-lifted bulls values `15582`, `11214`, `6237`, `11060` match a validated coprime-family `G`. Only `Y1*7 = 6237` lies inside any validated coprime interval, namely the `(35,72)` and `(40,63)` intervals, but it still fails the square test and so does not certify a direct `G` construction. The post-cows lane now promotes this as a stable obstruction item `pyth2_figure29_c5040_direct_g_obstruction` rather than leaving the whole Figure 29 block rhetorical.
